Home / Services / Garage Door Panel Replacement

Garage Door Panel Replacement

Replacing individual garage door panels to restore your door's appearance.

Damaged garage door panels can detract from your home's curb appeal and compromise its security. Gold Tech Overhead offers garage door panel replacement services throughout Minneapolis, restoring the look and functionality of your door. Whether your panel is dented, cracked, or rusted, we can replace it with a matching panel.

We carry a wide selection of replacement panels to match most garage door styles and colors. Our technicians can quickly and efficiently remove the damaged panel and install a new one, restoring the appearance of your garage door. We also offer painting and finishing services to ensure that the new panel blends seamlessly with the rest of your door.

Replacing individual panels is a cost-effective alternative to replacing the entire garage door. It's a great way to improve your home's curb appeal without breaking the bank.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Panel Assessment – We'll assess the damage and identify the correct replacement panel.
  2. 02 Step 2: Panel Removal – We'll carefully remove the damaged panel.
  3. 03 Step 3: Panel Installation – We'll install the new panel and secure it in place.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing Touches – We'll paint or finish the panel to match the rest of the door.

Benefits

  • Cost-Effective Solution
  • Improved Curb Appeal
  • Restored Security
  • Matching Panels

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you match the color of my existing garage door panel?

Yes, we can match the color of your existing garage door panel. We offer painting and finishing services to ensure that the new panel blends seamlessly with the rest of your door.

Is it cheaper to replace a panel or the whole door?

In most cases, it is cheaper to replace a single panel than to replace the entire garage door. However, if multiple panels are damaged, it may be more cost-effective to replace the entire door. We can assess the damage and provide you with a recommendation.

Do you offer insulated garage door panels?

Yes, we offer insulated garage door panels that can improve your garage's energy efficiency and reduce noise. We can help you choose the right insulated panel for your needs.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with garage door panel replacement? Contact us today.
